title: Dryad: A Nextflow pipeline for examining prokaryote relatedness
description: Dryad is a Nextflow pipeline for examining prokaryote relatedness through phylogenetic analysis. It analyzes assembled FASTA genomes (from Spriggan or PHoeNIx) to perform either reference-free historical comparisons across multiple years and outbreaks using Mashtree, or fine-scale outbreak investigations using alignment-based methods (Parsnp, IQ-TREE2, and snp-dists). The pipeline includes quality assessment via QUAST, generates phylogenetic trees, calculates SNP distance matrices, and produces comprehensive summary reports for public health bioinformatics workflows.
